```javascript
const symbols = ['#', '$', '%', '&', '*'];
const hashtags = ['#tag1', '#tag2', '#tag3', '#tag4', '#tag5'];

Twitter.newTweetByUser.Text
    .filter(tweet => tweet.includes('RT'))
    .map(tweet => tweet.replace('RT', '').replace(/@\w+/g, ''))
    .filter(tweet => tweet.length <= 122)
    .map(tweet => tweet + symbols[Math.floor(Math.random() * symbols.length)] + hashtags[Math.floor(Math.random() * hashtags.length)])
    .forEach(tweet => Twitter.postNewTweet.setTweet(tweet));

Twitter.newTweetByUser.Text
    .filter(tweet => !tweet.includes('RT'))
    .map(tweet => tweet.replace(/@\w+/g, ''))
    .filter(tweet => tweet.length <= 122)
    .map(tweet => tweet + symbols[Math.floor(Math.random() * symbols.length)] + hashtags[Math.floor(Math.random() * hashtags.length)])
    .forEach(tweet => Twitter.postNewTweet.setTweet(tweet));

Twitter.newTweetByUser.Text
    .filter(tweet => tweet.includes('RT'))
    .map(tweet => tweet.replace('RT', '').replace(/@\w+/g, ''))
    .filter(tweet => tweet.length > 122 && tweet.length <= 140)
    .forEach(tweet => Twitter.postNewTweet.setTweet(tweet));

Twitter.newTweetByUser.Text
    .filter(tweet => !tweet.includes('RT'))
    .map(tweet => tweet.replace(/@\w+/g, ''))
    .filter(tweet => tweet.length > 122 && tweet.length <= 140)
    .forEach(tweet => Twitter.postNewTweet.setTweet(tweet));

Twitter.newTweetByUser.Text
    .filter(tweet => tweet.length > 140)
    .forEach(tweet => Twitter.postNewTweet.skip());
```

```javascript
    .setTitle(Feed.newFeedItem.EntryTitle)
    .setTitleUrl(Feed.newFeedItem.EntryUrl)
    .setImageUrl(Feed.newFeedItem.EntryImageUrl)
: Slack.postToChannel.skip
```
